title: Ecoasis Interface
description: Spruce-ifies the GUI and replaces the default font.
body:
Howdy y'all, Here's the start of my **Ecoasis Interface** GUI resource pack! It is meant to be used alongside my font pack **Ecoasis Sans** and modpack **Ecoasis Exploration**, however, all of them are currently in development at the same time so please bear with me. My initial idea for this pack is to make it look similar to Minecraft's spruce wood while being more detailed. So far I have only done the messed with the generic menu textures and added a wood grain texture on top. I plan to eventually make my own version of every vanilla GUI texture and add support for various mods later on. Supports versions 1.20.2 to 1.21.11 Enjoy the start of my creative endeavor :)

If you would like to contribute ideas for this pack, or any of my other projects, the best way to contact me is Discord.
